zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury於1384年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親Sir Richard Talbot23歲，母親Ankaret le Strange23歲。他於1407年3月12日之前與Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年7月17日在法國阿奎泰藍德斯卡斯利享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury于1384年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Richard Talbot23岁，母亲Ankaret le Strange23岁。他于1407年3月12日之前与Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1453年7月17日在法国阿奎泰藍德斯卡斯利享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾其其。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury was born in 1384, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 23 and his mother, Ankaret le Strange, was 23. He married Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival before 12 March 1407. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 July 1453, in Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury est né en 1384, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ankaret le Strange, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival avant 12 mars 1407. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1453, à Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury 1384 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Talbot 23 und seine Mutter Ankaret le Strange 23. Er hat vor 12. März 1407 Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1453 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury è nato il nel 1384 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Talbot, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Ankaret le Strange, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival prima del 12 marzo 1407. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1453, nel Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsburyが1384年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは23歳，母Ankaret le Strangeは23歳であった。1407年3月12日以前にMaude Neville, Baroness Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年7月17日にフランスアクイティアインランズカスティロンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury(이)가 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Ankaret le Strange(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1407년 3월 12일 이전 Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 7월 17일 프랑스 아키테인 랜데스 카스틸런에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.between 26 October 1409 and 26 February: de 26 de outubro de 1409 a 26 de fevereiro de 1421
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury nasceu em 1384, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ankaret le Strange, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival antes 12 de março de 1407. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1453, em Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury родился в 1384 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ankaret le Strange, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival перед 12 марта 1407 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1453 г. в местности кастиллон, ландесь, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury nació en 1384, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Talbot, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ankaret le Strange, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival antes de 12 de marzo de 1407. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1453, en Castillon, Landes, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
